$comment: §4.5 .mcp.json template installed by /argo:init. Declares the argo status MCP server (Streamable HTTP). The launch path rewrites `url` per session to the key-scoped endpoint the harness binds (127.0.0.1:<ephemeral>/mcp/<correlation-key>); ${ARGO_MCP_URL} is the placeholder it fills. Referenced on spawn via --mcp-config --strict-mcp-config so only this server is exposed.
